content: node --experimental-test-coverage: available since Node 18+, stable flag in v22. Generates V8 coverage. Built-in lcov reporter: node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-reporter=lcov --test-reporter-destination=lcov.info. No test results emitted by lcov reporter alone — pair with spec or tap. NODE_V8_COVERAGE env var writes raw V8 JSON files to a dir. Coverage only covers files loaded in-process; subprocess-spawned code (execFileSync) is NOT covered unless NODE_V8_COVERAGE is passed to child env. This is the critical constraint for agentmap-php: tests spawn node as subprocess, so --experimental-test-coverage will show near-zero src/ coverage.
